headline: Simon Property Group (SPG) Price Target Raised at Scotiabank. Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.06%, Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) is included among the 12 Best S&P 500 Stocks to Buy for Dividends. Simon Property Group, Inc.
